title: Rename and Organise Automations
excerpt: I have many automations on some boards, and I would like to orgnaise them into folders and rename them so I can easily identify and differentiate the automations. Pls and thank you!

posts.author: Sky-Falcon (Nick)
posts.cookedHtml: I have many automations on some boards, and I would like to orgnaise them into folders and rename them so I can easily identify and differentiate the automations. Pls and thank you!

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Have you seen the option to save as a set template name or add your own custom description to help with this?

image566×118 8.59 KB

posts.author: Mindflows_Shanine (Shanine Velarde)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Sky-Falcon Shanine here from Mindflows. While folders for automations are not available as of the moment (could be a nice feature request!) You can add a description per automation and use the Compact View. Hope this helps!

apr30.12660×772 171 KB

posts.author: Sky-Falcon (Nick)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the info guys, looking forward to more feature updates- Monday is awesome @Mindflows_Shanine @Clarey
